60+ Years

Our Heritage

Where Every Recipe
Tells a Story

"We, the Kaskes Family, began a baking tradition in 1838 that continues through present day now in two countries. The Kaskes Bakery is still flourishing in The Netherlands — as are we here at Hillcrest Bakery in the United States."

In 1934, Hillcrest Bakery opened its doors in Bothell with a simple promise: to bake the way Dutch grandmothers have always baked. With patience. With pride. With the finest ingredients, and not a single preservative in sight.

Over sixty years later, that promise hasn't wavered. The same almond paste goes into our banket staaf. The same spice blend perfumes our speculaas. Generation after generation, we've kept the old ways alive — because some things are simply too good to change.

1838

Signature

Danish & Pastries

European Classics

Cookies & Petit Fours

Hidden Gems

Our Dutch Signatures

These are the recipes you won't find at any grocery store. Authentic Dutch and European specialties made the old-fashioned way — because some flavors are worth preserving forever.

01 ·

Banket Staaf

Flaky puff pastry wrapped around a rich, fragrant almond paste filling. A Dutch Christmas classic — and our bestseller year-round.

02 ·

Speculaas Cookies

Deeply spiced windmill cookies pressed from century-old wooden molds. Warm with cinnamon, cardamom, and clove — impossible to eat just one.

03 ·

Marzipan Rolls

Smooth almond confection shaped by hand and enrobed in delicate icing. A timeless Dutch indulgence, made with pure almond paste.

04 ·

Weihnacht Stollen

A German Christmas bread enriched with dried fruits, marzipan, and warming spices, dusted in powdered sugar. Available each holiday season.

05 ·

Almond Kringle

A Scandinavian ring pastry layered with buttery almond filling and finished with a delicate glaze. Light, flaky, and utterly memorable.

06 ·

Apple Strudel & More

Napoleons, éclairs, taai taai, yulekaka, almond macaroons — the full European canon, baked fresh to order throughout the year.

"Some of these recipes have never left our family."

— The Hillcrest Bakery Family
Available daily — until sold out

Every Morning

Rise & Shine with
Something Special

Every morning, our bakers arrive before dawn to fill the cases with something worth waking up for. These treats move fast — so come early or call ahead to set something aside.

  • 🧁Fresh-Baked Muffins — seasonal flavors daily
  • 🍩Raised & Cake Doughnuts
  • 🥐Hand-Folded Turnovers & Croissants
  • 🍮Cream Cheese & Fruit Danish Pastries
  • 🍎Apple Fritters
  • 🍞Fresh Breads — No Preservatives

Cake Allergy Notes

  • Carrot cake contains walnuts (no raisins)
  • German Chocolate contains coconut
  • Black Forest contains cherry liqueur
  • Marzipan contains almonds

For Your Special Day

Wedding Cakes by
The Kaskes Family

"For over 60 years we at Hillcrest Bakery have created beautiful custom wedding cakes for couples just like you. Whether your style is simplistic, ornate, traditional, or contemporary — we have the perfect cake for you. Barbara, Peter Jr. and Bob carry on the family business and are always excited to create a distinctive wedding cake that matches your style."

— The Kaskes Family, Hillcrest Bakery

Call us at (425) 486-5292 to set up a tasting appointment. We are available Tuesdays, Wednesdays and Saturdays from 8am–11am. Appointments typically last 1 hour, including a consultation with your decorator.

You'll taste our most popular flavors: Traditional White with raspberry & lemon filling, Chocolate Silk with Bavarian custard, White Cake with Bavarian custard & raspberry, and Chocolate Silk with raspberry filling.

Please bring inspiration photos, color swatches, and day-of details. There is a $40 tasting fee paid in advance — which goes directly toward your cake if you choose to work with us.

We recommend ordering 2–3 months before your wedding date. We do not take orders more than one year in advance. All cake details must be confirmed at least one month prior to the wedding.

Payment: Full payment is due one month prior to the wedding date.

Deposit: We only ask for a refundable deposit on the pillars and plates that structurally support your cake. Once returned after the wedding, you'll receive a gift card for future purchases. No deposit is required to hold your date.

We deliver wedding cakes for a fee based on delivery location. Please note there is an extra charge for Sunday deliveries as the shop is closed. Contact us for a delivery quote.

We are happy to arrange fresh flowers on your cake when we deliver. We ask that you order the flowers from your florist so you get the exact types and colors you want.

For ribbon, please provide your own — this way you get the exact color and thickness that works with your design.

White Buttercream

Made with real butter, with a slightly creamy tint. Tastes wonderful and holds up beautifully in even the hottest Northwest weather. A recipe passed down through generations.

European Marzipan

A traditional European topping made with rich almond paste — a very old Dutch recipe from our bakery in Holland. Smooth, beige-tinted, and unmistakably artisan.

Fondant (Satin Ice)

High-quality rolled fondant — pure white with a very smooth look. Tastes like melted marshmallows or sugar cookie dough. Chocolate Fondant is also available.

All Custom Cakes

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

No — custom cakes can never be made day of. However, we do have storefront cakes made and decorated available for purchase at all times.

Yes! We have 4 free parking spaces to the left of our building. If they are full, there is street parking available along both Main Street and Bothell Way.

Yes — we have a 9″ flourless chocolate cake that is gluten free. We don't offer dairy free cakes, but we do carry several dairy free and gluten free pastries and cookies. See our Allergy Info tab in the menu section.

Yes! We deliver for a $30 flat fee plus $4 per mile from the bakery. On Sundays, the flat fee doubles to $60 since the shop is closed. Contact us to arrange delivery.

Keep the cake on the floor of the car or in the trunk — never on the seat. A trusted lap is also a good option. We'll make sure it's boxed securely before you leave.

We don't print edible images in house, but you're welcome to bring one to us and we'll place and decorate with it. We recommend Dawn's Candy & Cake Supply in Lynnwood for printing.

All of our cakes have 4 layers of cake and 3 layers of filling — that makes 1 tier. Tiered cakes have a larger cake base with a smaller cake on top, like a wedding cake.

Our German Chocolate Cake is chocolate cake with a pecan, caramel, and coconut filling, topped with chocolate buttercream frosting and the same filling on top.

Our Black Forest Cake is chocolate cake with cherry filling, cherry liqueur, and whipped cream frosting — topped with chocolate shavings and maraschino cherries.

We often have pies in our storefront, but to ensure you get the flavor you want, call us to place an order and we'll have it ready the next day.

Our bread schedule is set and we stick to it. There may be a leftover loaf from the previous day — feel free to ask. Check the Artisan Bread tab in our menu for the full weekly schedule.

Emails are checked 10am–4pm, Monday through Friday. If you need to reach us sooner, call us directly at (425) 486-5292. Note: emails are not checked Saturday afternoon through Monday morning.

Why Bothell Keeps Coming Back

Baked with Integrity,
Served with Heart

🏡

Family Owned & Operated

Since 1934, Hillcrest has been a family affair — passed from one generation to the next. You're not just a customer here. You're a neighbor.

🌿

No Preservatives, Ever

Our bread and pastries contain what they should — real butter, real flour, real eggs. Nothing artificial. Nothing unnecessary. Just honest baking.

🇳🇱

Authentic Dutch Recipes

These aren't imitations. Our speculaas and banket staaf come from the same recipes our family brought from the Netherlands decades ago.

🌅

Fresh Every Single Morning

Our bakers are up before the sun. By the time you arrive, everything in the case was made that day — and most of it will be gone by early afternoon.

⭐

Locally Loved for Decades

Generations of Bothell families have made Hillcrest part of their traditions — birthdays, holidays, Sunday mornings. We're woven into this community.

✨

Premium Quality Ingredients

From real almond paste to European-style butter, we source ingredients the way our grandparents did — with standards that simply don't cut corners.

What Our Customers Say

Sixty Years of Happy Families

★★★★★

"For custom cakes, I highly recommend Hillcrest Bakery! Elise knew exactly what to ask and how to guide me through the process. The cake turned out insanely cute and tasted delicious. This was wedding cake quality at my son's birthday party. You get what you pay for — and it beats anything you'd find at the grocery store."

C
Catherine M. Elite
Addison, TX · Yelp Review · Aug 2025
★★★★★

"When I walked into Hillcrest Bakery, I was overwhelmed in a very good way! You can clearly see their commitment to baking traditions throughout the generations. Prices are so fair and reasonable considering they bake everything from scratch. My consistent pick up is the frosted apple spice donut — the spices are warm and aromatic."

C
Caitlin T. Elite
Bellevue, WA · Yelp Review · Aug 2025
★★★★★

"We go into bakeries just to admire the pastries because we're gluten and dairy free. I cannot believe how many different items they had. They have really wonderful gluten and dairy free donuts and oat bars — the best pastries we have found anywhere in many years. It is worth the trip."

M
Michele J.
Seattle, WA · Yelp Review · May 2026
★★★★★

"This is one of the best bakeries I've ever been to! Everything was delicious — from the soufflé to the cannoli, from the shortbread cookies to the oatmeal raspberry bars. Just 5 stars all around. You have gotta try this place if you're in the area."

R
Richard B.
Los Angeles, CA · Yelp Review · May 2026
★★★★★

"Wonderful pastries and lovely customer service. The lemon bars and carrot cake are my all time favorite. The carrot cake has coconut on the edge and makes the slice that much more amazing! The sticky bun is pretty good too. Such a large variety of pastries and delicious goodness all in one place."

J
Jennifer L. Elite
Marysville, WA · Yelp Review · Jul 2024
★★★★★

"This old, family owned bakery is just fantastic. They offer a huge selection of savory croissants, buttery sweet croissants, many small cakes and petit fours, cannolis, cookies, donuts and sweet rolls. A daily bread that changes often. Very customer friendly. One of Bothell's true gems."

R
Ric C. Elite
Bothell, WA · Yelp Review · Feb 2026
Y
5 ★ on Yelp Reviewed by locals, visitors & food lovers across the Pacific Northwest
